_comment: Species: Thunder Ape (雷猿) from Pursuit of the Truth. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Thunder Ape

canonical.appearance: Bipedal ape 4 m tall, fur crackling with thunder, fists strike with lightning
canonical.size: 4 m adult, 4000 jin; ancient 12 m, 80000 jin
canonical.behavior: Pack hunter during storms; cultivates by absorbing lightning on peaks
canonical.relationships: Rival of Lei Ji; preyed upon by thunder celestial beasts
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: thunder_ape — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
